suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align repository-level .factory/services.yaml baseline commands with the DWG parser validation lane used by this mission, or document the mission-specific override in a single authoritative place.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: .factory/services.yaml lists cargo test -p h7cad-native-dxf -p h7cad-native-model -p h7cad-native-facade -- --test-threads=16, while mission AGENTS.md specifies the DWG lane baseline cargo check -p h7cad-native-dwg, cargo test -p h7cad-native-dwg -- --test-threads=1, and cargo check -p h7cad-native-facade. The fix handoff for worker 98a92667-3fb8-4844-a3f1-f34fe94cb894 explicitly calls out this mismatch in discoveredIssues.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the dwg-fixture-worker startup guidance so it does not direct DWG parser workers to the DXF-oriented .factory/library/user-testing.md file as primary context.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: dwg-fixture-worker SKILL.md work procedure step 1 requires `.factory/library/user-testing.md`. The file at `D:/work/plant-code/cad/H7CAD/.factory/library/user-testing.md` is DXF-native focused and does not describe the DWG semantic-type-coverage mission, while the fix transcript shows the worker separately read `mission.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `validation-contract.md`, and `features.json` for actual DWG context.
